creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
This was already fixed by yasu@:

commit 568882d1b82ef4bf8cbd18175f3c2ef41ce93399
Author: Yasuhiro Kimura <yasu@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Thu Nov 28 18:37:13 2024 +0900

    security/gnupg: Stop running autoreconf and directly patch doc/Makefile.in

and I just did the unrelated update to 2.4.7:

commit 6d6acebeae32d849fc451391a580bc6802a5bd8b (HEAD -> main, origin/main, origin/HEAD)
Author: Adriaan de Groot <adridg@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Sat Dec 7 22:09:38 2024 +0100

    gnupg: update to 2.4.7, latest upstream
